description: A professor wants to update the course description for a course they are teaching next semester.

nodes.task_description: Identify the professor and the course to be updated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the professor is the instructor of record for 'HIST301'.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new course description from the professor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the new text for the description.

nodes.task_description: Submit the change in the curriculum management system for approval and update of the online catalog.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the course description.
